notes: Source material (TCRF) contains primarily development/archival data rather than gameplay manifestation analysis. Visual communication systems must be inferred from platform capabilities (NES sprite/tile limitations) and spy-genre conventions. Debug passwords reveal weapon variety (grenades, glow effects) and unlimited resource states, indicating resource scarcity was primary world-state differentiator. Unused parachute sprite suggests cut infiltration/escape mechanic. Game designed by Eurocom for animated series IP; visual language adapted for NES technical constraints.
